glosses.ja: 主張する; 強調する

translations.en: I insist, but he doesn't listen.
translations.es: Insisto, pero él no me escucha.
translations.de: Ich bestehe darauf, aber er hört mir nicht zu.
translations.it: Insisto, ma lui non mi ascolta.
translations.ko: 나는 계속 주장하지만 그는 내 말을 듣지 않아.
translations.ru: Я настаиваю, но он меня не слушает.
translations.pt: Eu insisto, mas ele não me escuta.
translations.he: אני מתעקשת, אבל הוא לא מקשיב.
translations.tr: Israr ediyorum ama o beni dinlemiyor.
translations.vi: Tôi cứ khăng khăng, nhưng anh ấy không chịu nghe.
translations.ar: أنا أصر، لكنه لا يستمع إليّ.
translations.nl: Ik dring aan, maar hij luistert niet.
translations.uk: Я наполягаю, але він мене не слухає.
translations.hu: Ragaszkodom, de ő nem hallgat rám.
translations.hi: मैं ज़िद करती हूँ, लेकिन वह मेरी बात नहीं सुनता।
translations.pl: Upieram się, ale on mnie nie słucha.
translations.el: Επιμένω, αλλά εκείνος δεν με ακούει.
translations.nb: Jeg insisterer, men han hører ikke etter.
translations.id: Aku bersikeras, tapi dia tidak mendengarkan.
translations.sv: Jag insisterar, men han lyssnar inte.
translations.ro: Insist, dar el nu mă ascultă.
translations.cs: Trvám na svém, ale on mě neposlouchá.
translations.da: Jeg insisterer, men han lytter ikke.
translations.ja: 私は主張するが、彼は聞いてくれない。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular present indicative of 'insister'; includes elided subject clitic 'j'' (= 'je') before a vowel, yielding the meaning 'I insist'.
Coordinating conjunction introducing contrast between clauses.
3rd person singular subject pronoun.
3rd person singular present of 'écouter' with attached clitic 'ne' marking negation; 'pas' later completes the 'ne ... pas' negation.
Negative adverb completing the 'ne ... pas' negation.

translations.de: Hör bitte auf, darauf zu bestehen.
translations.vi: Làm ơn đừng cứ khăng khăng nữa.
translations.nb: Vær så snill, slutt å insistere.
translations.ja: お願い、もうしつこくしないで。

tokens.explanation: Imperative 2nd person singular of 'arrêter'.
Preposition 'de' elided to 'd'' before vowel plus infinitive 'insister'; forms the verb complement after 'arrêter de'.
Subordinating conjunction 'si' contracted before vowel with subject pronoun 'il'; introduces a conditional clause (here part of the idiom 's'il te plaît' = 'please').
2nd person singular clitic pronoun (indirect object).
3rd person singular present of 'plaire' ('to please'); literally 'if it pleases you'.

sentences.target: Nous insistons sur la sécurité au travail.
sentences.reading: /nu ɛ̃.sis.tɔ̃ syʁ la se.ky.ʁi.te o tʁa.vaj/

translations.fr: Nous insistons sur la sécurité au travail.
translations.ipa: /nu ɛ̃.sis.tɔ̃ syʁ la se.ky.ʁi.te o tʁa.vaj/
translations.en: We insist on safety at work.
translations.es: Hacemos hincapié en la seguridad en el trabajo.
translations.de: Wir legen großen Wert auf Arbeitssicherheit.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们强调工作中的安全。
translations.ru: Мы настаиваем на безопасности на работе.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi nhấn mạnh an toàn tại nơi làm việc.
translations.ar: نحن نؤكد على السلامة في العمل.
translations.nl: We leggen de nadruk op veiligheid op het werk.
translations.uk: Ми наполягаємо на безпеці на роботі.
translations.hi: हम कार्यस्थल पर सुरक्षा पर ज़ोर देते हैं.
translations.el: Επιμένουμε στην ασφάλεια στον χώρο εργασίας.
translations.nb: Vi insisterer på sikkerhet på arbeidsplassen.
translations.id: Kami menekankan keselamatan di tempat kerja.
translations.sv: Vi insisterar på säkerhet på arbetsplatsen.
translations.ro: Insistăm asupra siguranței la locul de muncă.
translations.da: Vi insisterer på sikkerhed på arbejdspladsen.
translations.ja: 私たちは職場の安全を重視しています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural subject pronoun.
1st person plural present indicative of 'insister'.
Preposition meaning 'on/about', marking the focus/topic.
Definite article, feminine singular, agreeing with 'sécurité'.
Common noun meaning 'safety/security'.
Contraction of preposition 'à' plus definite article 'le' ('à le' -> 'au').
Common noun meaning 'work/workplace'.

translations.en: They insist on paying the bill.
translations.de: Sie bestehen darauf, die Rechnung zu bezahlen.
translations.ru: Они настаивают на том, чтобы заплатить счёт.
translations.pt: Eles insistem em pagar a conta.
translations.vi: Họ khăng khăng đòi trả tiền.
translations.nl: Ze staan erop de rekening te betalen.
translations.uk: Вони наполягають на тому, щоб заплатити рахунок.
translations.hu: Ragaszkodnak ahhoz, hogy kifizessék a számlát.
translations.hi: वे बिल चुकाने की ज़िद करते हैं।
translations.nb: De insisterer på å betale regningen.
translations.sv: De insisterar på att betala notan.
translations.cs: Trvají na tom, že zaplatí účet.
translations.da: De insisterer på at betale regningen.
translations.ja: 彼らは勘定を払うと言って聞かない。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person plural subject pronoun.
3rd person plural present indicative of 'insister'.
Preposition expressing purpose ('in order to').
Infinitive verb functioning as complement of 'pour'.
Definite article 'l'' (elided 'le') attached to the noun 'addition' ('the bill/check'); the article marks definiteness.
